name: Medeski Martin & Wood
description:
'''Medeski Martin & Wood''' (or '''MMW''') is an American [[jazz fusion]] band formed in 1991, consisting of [[John Medeski]] on keyboards, [[Billy Martin (percussionist)|Billy Martin]] on drums, and [[Chris Wood (jazz musician)|Chris Wood]] on bass. The band is influenced by musical traditions including [[funk]] and [[Hip hop music|hip hop]] and is known for an unconventional style sometimes described as "[[avant-jazz|avant]]-[[Groove (music)|groove]]".

MMW has found moderate mainstream success, often working with guitarist [[John Scofield]] and touring on the [[jam band]] circuit.
